prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock turbocharger on the **EP6FDT 1.6L Turbo (THP205)** with a **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbo** paired with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe** (e.g., **Milltek Sport** or **Sebring** with 200-cell catalytic converter for emissions compliance) and a **Forge Motorsport recirculating diverter valve** to eliminate boost leaks under high psi (targeting 26-28 psi on 98 RON fuel).

Fuel System: Upgrade to **Siemens Deka 870cc injectors** (OEM+ flow rate) with a **Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU** (mapped for **E85 flex-fuel compatibility**) and a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump** to support 350+ hp at the wheels. Pair with a **PTP Motorsport high-pressure fuel rail** and **NGK 97506 (ILKAR7L11) iridium spark plugs** gapped at 0.020" for optimized combustion.

Suspension & Handling: Install **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (308-specific valving)** with **Eibach 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars** and **SuperPro polybushings (part #SPF1044K)** for subframe reinforcement. Replace OEM control arms with **Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms (KTA103)** and **Meyle HD front lower control arms (16-16 600 0025)** to correct bump steer under hard cornering. Use **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (235/35 R19 front, 255/30 R19 rear)** on **BBS CH-R II 19x8.5 ET35 (front) / 19x9.5 ET40 (rear) wheels** for optimal load distribution.
estetica: Aero: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (308 GTI-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber front canards (e.g., **Rieger Tuning** or **Prior Design**) and a **Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser** (308-compatible, 3-piece carbon fiber). Replace the OEM rear spoiler with a **Seibon Carbon GTI rear wing (duckbill style, 308-specific mounting points)** for 80-100 lbs of downforce at 120 mph.

Exterior: Dechrome all trim with **3M Matte Black Vinyl Wrap (2080 series)** and apply **Luxury Tint 20% ceramic window film** (including windshield upper strip). Replace OEM headlights with **Depo Racing LED projector headlights (308 GTI plug-and-play, sequential turn signals)** and add **Morimoto XB LED fog lights (3000K amber tint)**. Paint calipers in **Griot’s Garage Race Red** with **AP Racing CP9660 front / CP9444 rear big brake kit (355mm front, 330mm rear, 6-piston front / 4-piston rear)** for track-ready stopping power.

Interior: Swap OEM seats for **Recaro Pole Position (Evo II) seats (308 GTI-specific mounting brackets)** with **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses (FIA-approved)**. Replace the steering wheel with a **Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede, 6-bolt pattern)** and add a **Defi BF Advance gauge pod (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR)** mounted on the A-pillar. Install **Sound Deadener Pro 80 mil damping sheets** on floor pans and door cards, paired with a **Hertz MLK 165.3 6.5" component system (front) / MLK 1650 6.5" coaxial (rear)** and a **JL Audio Stealthbox (308-specific subwoofer enclosure)** for audio clarity.
